title: Financial Accountant
description:
Lico Resources is partnering with a reputable financial institution known for its stability, disciplined operations, and long-standing presence in the industry. With a strong track record of compliance and financial stewardship, the organization offers a collaborative environment that values continuous learning and professional growth.

This is an excellent opportunity for a finance professional with a strong foundation in external audit or financial accounting to transition into a commercial accounting role within the financial services industry. Based in Singapore, the role is ideal for individuals looking to build a long-term career in finance with exposure to a regulated and fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Prepare timely and accurate monthly and quarterly financial reports in compliance with internal and regulatory requirements
  • Perform general ledger accounting, including journal entries, accruals, and account reconciliations
  • Support month-end and year-end closing activities across various business units
  • Assist with external and internal audits by preparing required schedules and documentation
  • Ensure adherence to accounting standards (e.g. IFRS) and internal financial controls
  • Participate in the preparation of budgets and forecasts, supporting variance analysis as required
  • Maintain up-to-date documentation of accounting processes and policies
  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders to resolve accounting queries and improve financial processes
  • Contribute to initiatives related to finance transformation, automation, and system enhancements

Qualifications:

Must-Have:

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance or a related field
  • 3 to 5 years of relevant experience, preferably from a Big 4 external audit firm or in a financial institution
  • Solid understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting standards (e.g. IFRS)
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting systems such as SAP, Oracle, or equivalent
  • Strong attention to detail, good analytical skills, and a hands-on approach to problem solving
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work both independently and in a team setting

Nice-to-Have:

  • Professional certifications such as CPA, ACCA, or equivalent (completed or in progress)
  • Familiarity with MAS reporting and regulatory requirements
  • Exposure to the financial services sector or regulated environments
  • Experience participating in process improvement or automation projects

If you are interested in this role, please send us your updated resume today to nicole@licoresources.com quoting reference number A07216. Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

"Data provided is for recruitment purposes only."
Job Reference No: A07216 EA Licence No.: 13C6733
EA Registration No.: R1333454

postedCompany.description:
Lico Resources is a Singapore-based executive search firm with footprints in Southeast Asia and greater China. We operate across various industries to help both local and global clients build capable, effective teams.

Our approach is simple:

Deliver Exceptional Services And Results; And Build Genuine, Long-term Relationships With Our Clients And Candidates.

We don’t promise you the sky, but we do promise to bring professionalism, competency and commitment to every working relationship.

We are passionate about what we do and we take your needs seriously.

Lico Resources has been growing steadily through repeat business from our satisfied clients who in turn recommend us to their business associates and friends. We think that is the best form of marketing any business can ever have, and it can only come from offering exceptional value to the clients we work with.
